title: Squirrel Removal in Larchmont, NY | $900-$2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Larchmont, Westchester. Humane extraction, exclusion & attic cleanup. Licensed experts serving Larchmont Manor & surrounding areas. Call today!
intro: Larchmont's tree-lined streets and historic homes provide ideal conditions for squirrel infestations in attics, chimneys, and wall voids. Best Pest Control NYC offers comprehensive squirrel removal services throughout Larchmont, addressing the unique challenges presented by the area's mature housing stock and abundant greenery. Our humane removal methods protect both your property and local wildlife while ensuring squirrels don't return.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over 15 years of wildlife control experience to Larchmont homes and businesses, with specialized knowledge of the architectural features common in Westchester properties. Our licensed technicians provide complete solutions including humane trapping, entry point sealing, attic restoration, and preventative exclusion work tailored to Larchmont's unique housing styles.
localContext: Larchmont's beautiful Tudor, Colonial, and Victorian homes near Larchmont Manor Park and along the Boston Post Road often feature complex rooflines, mature trees, and decorative trim that create multiple access points for squirrels. The proximity to Long Island Sound and abundance of oak and maple trees throughout the village make squirrel activity particularly common in residential attics and chimney systems.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Larchmont?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Larchmont typically ranges from $900 to $2,500 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of damage. This includes humane trapping, exclusion work, entry point sealing, and cleanup. Larger homes or those with extensive attic damage may require additional restoration services.

faqs.question: Why are squirrels so common in Larchmont homes?
faqs.answer: Larchmont's mature tree canopy, especially oak and maple trees, provides abundant food sources and natural highways for squirrels to access rooflines. The village's older homes often have architectural features like decorative eaves, attic vents, and chimney gaps that squirrels exploit for nesting, particularly during spring and fall breeding seasons.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Larchmont property?
faqs.answer: Most squirrel removal projects in Larchmont are completed within 3-7 days, depending on the number of squirrels and complexity of the situation. We begin with a thorough inspection, followed by humane trapping and removal, then seal all entry points to prevent re-entry. Emergency same-day service is available for urgent situations.

faqs.question: Do you repair squirrel damage to attics and insulation?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide complete attic restoration services including insulation replacement, contaminated material removal, sanitization, and repair of chewed wiring or structural damage. Squirrels often compress or soil insulation and create fire hazards by gnawing on electrical wires, so professional cleanup is essential after removal to restore your Larchmont home's safety and energy efficiency.
